positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest and botanical arrangement. Central composition featuring glowing constellations weaving through bioluminescent jungle flora and stylized deep-sea elements. The mood is dreamy, magical, and tranquil. Use a strong silhouette technique with glowing gradients against a dark, deep indigo and midnight blue background. Accent colors should be vibrant aqua, amethyst purple, and soft gold. Intricate linework, high contrast, symmetrical composition suitable for apparel printing. Studio quality, vector art style, clean edges, highly detailed illustration.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, sketch, cropped, out of frame, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, low detail
